justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions from the user throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to propose new times without offering any alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient in processing each request, but the lack of proactive suggestions led to more turns than necessary.
justifications.customer_experience: The experience was workable but became tiring due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times, requiring the user to repeatedly propose new slots.
